content.text:
Based on my visual inspection of the molecule, I can now identify the neighbour atoms of atom index 4.

## Results

**Atom 4 (C - Carbon)** is covalently bonded to the following neighbour atoms:

| Atomic Index | Element |
|--------------|---------|
| 2 | C (Carbon) |
| 48 | C (Carbon) |
| 5 | N (Nitrogen) |
| 54 | H (Hydrogen) |

**geomconf_index: 3472**

The carbon atom at index 4 is connected to two other carbon atoms (indices 2 and 48), one nitrogen atom (index 5), and one hydrogen atom (index 54), forming a tetrahedral bonding environment typical of sp³ hybridized carbon.

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 4, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
